programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: In a rematch of the 2017 AFC Championship, the Jaguars avenge the previous loss with a 31-20 win against Tom Brady and the Patriots. The temperature of 97 degrees and heat index of 107 make it the hottest NFL game since 2003 (Packers vs. Cardinals).

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.sub-title: Craziest Weather Moments in NFL History
programme.desc: Watch the craziest weather moments in NFL history.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.sub-title: Weather Games That Get Increasingly Crazier
programme.desc: Go through some of the worst elements mother nature has ever presented on a football field.

programme.title: The Timeline
programme.desc: The story behind the controversial play call that secured a playoff victory for the Patriots in a season that ended with a New England Super Bowl win.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2001 AFC Divisional Round: Raiders vs. Patriots
programme.desc: The Patriots would meet the Raiders in the Divisional Round of the AFC Playoffs and the New England victory was fueled by the controversial Tuck Rule, which consequently launched the Patriots into a dynasty.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Saquon Barkley dashed through the snow for two touchdown runs and finished with 205 yards rushing, Jalen Hurts had a 44-yard scoring run and the Eagles held on against the turnover-happy Rams 28-22 on Sunday to reach the NFC championship game.

programme.title: America's Game
programme.desc: A look back at the 2024 Philadelphia Eagles' run to Super Bowl LIX through the eyes of Nick Sirianni, Jalen Hurts, Zack Baun and Saquon Barkley.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.desc: Five snow games turned December 8, 2013, from a normal game day into NFL's Snowpocalyse.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: A youthful defense shut down Geno Smith and the slumping Seahawks offense, and the Chiefs rolled to a 24-10 win that allowed them to keep pace with Buffalo for the best record in the AFC.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.sub-title: 2015 NFC Wild Card: Seahawks vs. Vikings
programme.desc: Blair Walsh's 27-yard field goal attempt into the frigid wind hooked left with 22 seconds remaining and handed the Seattle Seahawks a 10-9 victory over the stunned Minnesota Vikings in below-zero weather. From Jan. 10, 2016.

programme.title: 24 Hours to Kickoff: Buffalo Bills
programme.desc: Everything that goes into preparing the Bills' stadium for a crazy weather game.

programme.title: NFL Explained: Worst Weather
programme.desc: When Mother Nature hits the gridiron. A look into the history of the wildest weather games in NFL history.

programme.title: NFL Explained: Worst Weather
programme.desc: When Mother Nature hits the gridiron. A look into the history of the wildest weather games in NFL history.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Watch the matchup between the Buffalo Bills and the Miami Dolphins where Bills quarterback Josh Allen threw for 417 yards and four touchdowns, both career highs, and the Bills beat the Dolphins.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Watch the matchup between the Buffalo Bills and the Miami Dolphins where Bills quarterback Josh Allen threw for 417 yards and four touchdowns, both career highs, and the Bills beat the Dolphins.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: With a game-time temperature of 109 degrees, the Philadelphia Eagles use pickle juice on the sideline to stay hydrated and blow out the Dallas Cowboys 41-14 in the 2000 season opener at Texas Stadium.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: With a game-time temperature of 109 degrees, the Philadelphia Eagles use pickle juice on the sideline to stay hydrated and blow out the Dallas Cowboys 41-14 in the 2000 season opener at Texas Stadium.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Jameis Winston threw for 332 and three touchdowns without an interception, and Nick Folk kicked a 34-yard field goal as time expired to give the Tampa Bay Buccaneers a 25-23 victory over the winless New York Giants on Sunday.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: A competitor's life is threatened by a serious illness as the team fights to stay out of elimination; the teams are driven to the edge.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: One team's recent success is short-lived as news of their fallen teammate spells potential disaster. A remarkable hole-out decides the fate of one captain, leaving the other staring elimination in the face.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Poor play by one golfer causes deep and irreparable divides within the house. A surprising decision by a captain leaves their team and fate on the brink of elimination.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The competitors take a road trip to one of Ireland's premiere links courses where the wind and two players' emotions try to blow the teams apart. Distrust and dislike forces one team to put emotions aside for the betterment of the group.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Competitors fight to remain and keep their hopes alive. Smelling blood, one team looks to eradicate the opposition.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: With the team competition complete, the final four realize that the end is near, and the title is now within their reach. A long awaited match between former teammates spells disaster for one, leaving the other fighting for their life.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.sub-title: You'll Need the Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: The final three are only one step away from locking up a spot in the finale, the only question is who will rise to the occasion?

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The final two contestants battle it out for the title of champion.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers want to get the most out of the driver. They demonstrate what the pros look like at impact and share what to do to get into that position.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward cover all things long game from fairway metals to hybrids and even how to master the dreaded long irons. They also teach how finding the low point in the swing helps create consistent strikes.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward explain the big three in iron play: how to control distance, accuracy, and trajectory on shots. They also show a footwork drill to help ball striking and what to do to work the ball into those tucked pins.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy Proudman and Piers Ward explain how to dial in distances with short irons and how to hit them on line every time; they also explain the bounce angle and how to choose the right amount.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers show how to play a variety of shots around the green, including the high spinning chip, low runner, and many more. They also explain the importance of focusing on a landing zone when hitting greenside shots.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain the necessary fundamentals to hit effective greenside and fairway bunker shots. They also explain how to hit it close from one of the most feared shots in the game, the 30-40-yard bunker shot.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Me and My Golf's Andy and Piers explain how to master judging speed and reads on the greens. They also demonstrate the proper mechanics for hitting it solid and making those clutch putts.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain how to master different lies on the course, featuring the buried lie, sitting up lie, and flyer lie.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain that the best play isn't always the hero shot. They demonstrate how save strokes by hitting over, under, and around trouble.

programme.title: Me and My Golf
programme.desc: Andy and Piers explain how to save strokes by thinking around the course; they'll demonstrate how to take advantage of both sides of the tee-box and the importance of a good pre-shot routine.

programme.title: My Roots: Ernie Els
programme.desc: Follow Ernie's journey from his early years in South Africa, to his climb to world No. 1, his battles with Tiger and the creation of his foundation Els for Autism.

programme.title: My Roots: Bernhard Langer
programme.desc: Bernhard Langer shares his own story in open and honest language, giving golf fans an unprecedented look at his life, losses, and love of the game.

programme.title: My Roots
programme.desc: The life and career of Darren Clarke of Northern Ireland; the path of golf, his life and his career, from Wake Forest University to the European Tour, the PGA Tour and beyond; his experience as a member of the European Ryder Cup team.

programme.title: Golf Central
programme.desc: Keep up with everything that's happening in the world of golf. The game's only live, daily news source provides more than just scores, delivering in depth analysis, breaking news, and unforgettable highlights.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Randall Hunt takes new client Roger Bassin through a 90-day program of unique exercises, high-tech analysis and swing instruction to alleviate neck issues.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Lower back pain is an issue that plagues many golfers, and Randall Hunt is on a mission to eliminate that physical limitation.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Randall Hunt takes David Shimp through a 90-day program of unique exercises, high-tech analysis and swing instruction to alleviate back issues.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Follow Randall Hunt and Brianna Asman as they learn how to increase range of motion, add distance and play pain-free golf through a 90-day program of swing instruction.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Follow Randall Hunt and Matt Avril learn how to increase mobility and turn his slice into a powerful draw.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to lower your scores by hitting more greens; find out how to set up for success like Xander Schauffele, improve your pivot like Tom Watson and learn a drill used by Tiger Woods to hit laser-like irons.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to control your ball flight like the best players; learn how to draw the ball on command like Rory McIlroy, hit powerful fades like Scottie Scheffler and rip low stingers down the fairway like Tiger Woods.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach how to improve your accuracy and distance; set up for success like Tommy Fleetwood, improve your swing path like Nelly Korda and learn a drill that helped Morgan Pressel win a Major Championship.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach the most important keys to getting up and down around the green; learn how to set up for success like Phil Mickelson, make solid wedge contact like Luke Donald and control trajectory like Tiger Woods.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: Martin Hall and Blair O'Neal teach putting grips, styles and drills used by the world's best players; learn how to stop pushing putts like Tiger Woods, eliminate the pull like Scottie Scheffler and put better roll on the ball like Dave Stockton.
